name: PROMPT_ON_CHARACTER_DEATH
tooltip: If enabled, when your character dies, the player is given a prompt that gives the option to reload the last saved game instead of dying.

name: DEF_CHAR_NAME
tooltip: Set a default character name that will be used instead of a random name on character creation.

name: DEF_CHAR_GENDER
tooltip: Set a default character gender that will be used on character creation.

title: Merge similar comestibles
desc: Configure how similar items are stacked.

name: MERGE_COMESTIBLES
tooltip: Merge similar comestibles.  Legacy: default behavior.  Liquid: Merge only liquid comestibles.  All: Merge all comestibles.

name: MERGE_COMESTIBLES_THRESHOLD
tooltip: Limit maximum allowed staleness difference when merging comestibles.  The lower the value, the more similar the items must be to merge.  0.0: Only merge identical items.  1.0: Merge comestibles regardless of its freshness.

name: AUTO_PICKUP
tooltip: Enable item auto pickup.  Change pickup rules with the Auto Pickup Manager.

name: AUTO_PICKUP_ADJACENT
tooltip: If true, will enable to pickup items one tile around to the player.  You can assign No Auto Pickup zones with the Zones Manager 'Y' key for e.g.  your homebase.

name: AUTO_PICKUP_WEIGHT_LIMIT
tooltip: Auto pickup items with weight less than or equal to [option] * 50 grams.  You must also set the small items option.  '0' disables this option

name: AUTO_PICKUP_VOL_LIMIT
tooltip: Auto pickup items with volume less than or equal to [option] * 50 milliliters.  You must also set the light items option.  '0' disables this option

name: AUTO_PICKUP_SAFEMODE
tooltip: Auto pickup is disabled as long as you can see monsters nearby.  This is affected by 'Safe Mode proximity distance'.

name: NO_AUTO_PICKUP_ZONES_LIST_ITEMS
menu_text: List items within no auto pickup zones
tooltip: If false, you will not see messages about items, you step on, within no auto pickup zones.

name: AUTO_FEATURES
tooltip: If true, enables configured auto features below.  Disabled as long as any enemy monster is seen.

name: AUTO_PULP_BUTCHER
tooltip: Action to perform when 'Auto pulp or butcher' is enabled.  Pulp: Pulp corpses you stand on.  - Pulp Adjacent: Also pulp corpses adjacent from you.  - Butcher: Butcher corpses you stand on.

name: AUTO_MINING
tooltip: If true, enables automatic use of wielded pickaxes and jackhammers whenever trying to move into mineable terrain.

name: AUTO_FORAGING
tooltip: Action to perform when 'Auto foraging' is enabled.  Bushes: Only forage bushes.  - Trees: Only forage trees.  - Everything: Forage bushes, trees, and everything else including flowers, cattails etc.

name: DANGEROUS_PICKUPS
tooltip: If false, will cause player to drop new items that cause them to exceed the weight limit.

name: DANGEROUS_TERRAIN_WARNING_PROMPT
tooltip: Always: You will be prompted to move onto dangerous tiles.  Running: You will only be able to move onto dangerous tiles while running and will be prompted.  Crouching: You will only be able to move onto a dangerous tile while crouching and will be prompted.  Never:  You will not be able to move onto a dangerous tile unless running and will not be warned or prompted.  Ignore:  You will be able to move onto a dangerous tile without any warnings or prompts.

name: SAFEMODE
tooltip: If true, will hold the game and display a warning if a hostile monster/npc is approaching.

name: SAFEMODEPROXIMITY
tooltip: If safe mode is enabled, distance to hostiles at which safe mode should show a warning.  0 = Max player view distance.  This option only has effect when no safe mode rule is specified.  Otherwise, edit the default rule in Safe Mode Manager instead of this value.

name: SAFEMODEVEH
tooltip: When true, safe mode will alert you of hostiles while you are driving a vehicle.

name: AUTOSAFEMODE
tooltip: If true, safe mode will automatically reactivate after a certain number of turns.  See option 'Turns to auto reactivate safe mode.'

name: AUTOSAFEMODETURNS
menu_text: Turns to auto reactivate safe mode
tooltip: Number of turns after which safe mode is reactivated.  Will only reactivate if no hostiles are in 'Safe mode proximity distance.'

name: SAFEMODEIGNORETURNS
tooltip: Number of turns an ignored monster stays ignored after it is no longer seen.  0 disables this option and monsters are permanently ignored.

name: QUERY_BEFORE_ATTACKING_NEUTRAL
tooltip: If true, you will be prompted to confirm before attacking neutral or fleeing monsters that you have yet to engage in combat with.

title: Clothing destruction popup
desc: Configure when popups appear due to clothing being destroyed.

name: CLOTHING_DESTRUCTION_POPUP
tooltip: If true, a popup will display when a piece of the player/NPC's worn clothing is destroyed.

name: CLOTHING_DESTRUCTION_POPUP_CONTENTS
tooltip: Only show popup if destroyed clothing has contents.

name: CLOTHING_DESTRUCTION_POPUP_MIN_WEIGHT
tooltip: Minimum weight of the item for the popup to trigger.

name: CLOTHING_DESTRUCTION_POPUP_MIN_VOLUME
tooltip: Minimum volume of the item for the popup to trigger.

name: TURN_DURATION
tooltip: If enabled, monsters will take periodic gameplay turns.  This value is the delay between each turn, in seconds.  Works best with Safe Mode disabled.  0 = disabled.

name: AUTOSAVE
tooltip: If true, game will periodically save the map.  Autosaves occur based on in-game turns or real-time minutes, whichever is larger.

name: AUTOSAVE_TURNS
tooltip: Number of game turns between autosaves

name: AUTOSAVE_MINUTES
tooltip: Number of real time minutes between autosaves

name: AUTO_NOTES
tooltip: If true, automatically sets notes

name: AUTO_NOTES_STAIRS
tooltip: If true, automatically sets notes on places that have stairs that go up or down

name: AUTO_NOTES_MAP_EXTRAS
tooltip: If true, automatically sets notes on places that contain various map extras

name: AUTO_NOTES_DROPPED_FAVORITES
tooltip: If true, automatically sets notes when player drops favorited items.

name: CIRCLEDIST
tooltip: If true, the game will calculate range in a realistic way: light sources will be circles, diagonal movement will cover more ground and take longer.  If disabled, everything is square: moving to the northwest corner of a building takes as long as moving to the north wall.

name: DROP_EMPTY
tooltip: Set to drop empty containers after use.  No: Don't drop any.  - Watertight: All except watertight containers.  - All: Drop all containers.

name: DEATHCAM
tooltip: Always: Always start deathcam.  Ask: Query upon death.  Never: Never show deathcam.
